div1.entryFree:
Conveniency, 1) favour of circumstances, advantage: and rather keepest from me all c. than suppliest me with the least advantage of hope, Oth. IV, 2, 178.
2) propriety: with all brief and plain c. let me have judgment and the Jew his will, Merch. IV, 1, 82 (== with all becoming briefness and plainness).
